arabic: عن أنس رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ نهى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  أن يبيع حاضر لباد وإن كان أخاه لأبيه وأمه‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Anas bin Malik (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) forbade that a person in the city should make a deal on behalf of a villager on commission even if he is his real brother."

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
